<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>Feliz Dia dos Namorados 💕</title>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400&family=Lato:wght@300;400&family=Dancing+Script:wght@600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  <style>
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

    :root {
      --rose:  #E8748A;
      --blush: #F9D4DC;
      --cream: #FFF6F8;
      --mauve: #C65B73;
      --deep:  #7A2D42;
      --gold:  #F0C070;
      --text:  #4A2030;
    }

    html, body {
      height: 100%;
      font-family: 'Lato', sans-serif;
      background: var(--cream);
      color: var(--text);
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    /* ── PAGES ── */
    .page {
      position: fixed; inset: 0;
      display: flex; flex-direction: column;
      align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      transition: opacity .7s ease, transform .7s ease;
      overflow-y: auto;
      padding: 24px 20px 80px;
    }
    .page.hidden    { opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; transform: translateX(60px); }
    .page.active    { opacity: 1; pointer-events: all;  transform: translateX(0); }
    .page.exit-left { opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; transform: translateX(-60px); }

    /* ── FLOATING HEARTS ── */
    .hearts-bg { position: fixed; inset: 0; pointer-events: none; z-index: 0; overflow: hidden; }
    .heart-float {
      position: absolute; bottom: -60px; font-size: 1.4rem; opacity: 0;
      animation: floatUp linear infinite;
    }
    @keyframes floatUp {
      0%   { transform: translateY(0) rotate(0deg);    opacity: 0; }
      10%  { opacity: .55; }
      90%  { opacity: .35; }
      100% { transform: translateY(-110vh) rotate(25deg); opacity: 0; }
    }

    /* ── SHARED BTN ── */
    .btn {
      display: inline-block; padding: 13px 36px;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--rose), var(--mauve));
      color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 50px;
      font-family: 'Lato', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem;
      letter-spacing: .08em; cursor: pointer;
      box-shadow: 0 6px 24px rgba(198,91,115,.4);
      transition: transform .2s, box-shadow .2s;
    }
    .btn:hover  { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 10px 32px rgba(198,91,115,.5); }
    .btn:active { transform: translateY(0); }

    @keyframes pulse { 0%,100%{opacity:.5} 50%{opacity:1} }

    /* ══════ PAGE 1 – COVER ══════ */
    #page1 { background: linear-gradient(160deg,#FFF0F4 0%,#FDDDE6 60%,#F5B8CB 100%); z-index:1; }
    .cover-inner { position: relative; z-index: 2; text-align: center; max-width: 440px; }

    .envelope-wrap { position: relative; display: inline-block; margin-bottom: 28px; cursor: pointer; }
    .envelope {
      width: 160px; height: 110px; background: var(--rose);
      border-radius: 8px; position: relative;
      box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(198,91,115,.35); transition: transform .25s;
    }
    .envelope::before {
      content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg,#E8748A 50%,transparent 50%), linear-gradient(-135deg,#E8748A 50%,transparent 50%);
      background-position: 0 100%; background-repeat: no-repeat; background-size: 50% 60%,50% 60%;
    }
    .envelope::after {
      content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
      border-left: 80px solid transparent; border-right: 80px solid transparent;
      border-top: 55px solid var(--mauve); border-radius: 8px 8px 0 0;
      transition: transform .5s ease, border-top-color .3s; transform-origin: top center;
    }
    .envelope-wrap.open .envelope::after { transform: rotateX(180deg); border-top-color: var(--deep); }
    .envelope-wrap:hover .envelope { transform: scale(1.06); }
    .envelope-heart { position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%,-50%); font-size: 2.4rem; z-index: 1; pointer-events: none; }

    .cover-title { font-family: 'Dancing Script',cursive; font-size: clamp(2rem,8vw,3rem); color: var(--deep); line-height: 1.2; margin-bottom: 10px; }
    .cover-sub   { font-size: .95rem; color: var(--mauve); letter-spacing: .05em; margin-bottom: 32px; }
    .tap-hint    { font-size: .8rem; color: var(--mauve); opacity: .7; margin-top: -18px; margin-bottom: 24px; animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite; }

    /* ══════ PAGE 2 – CARTA ══════ */
    #page2 { background: linear-gradient(175deg,#FFF0F4 0%,#FCE4EC 100%); z-index:1; justify-content: flex-start; }
    .letter-card {
      position: relative; z-index: 2;
      background: rgba(255,255,255,.88); backdrop-filter: blur(6px);
      border-radius: 20px; max-width: 480px; width: 100%;
      padding: 32px 28px 28px;
      box-shadow: 0 12px 48px rgba(198,91,115,.18);
      border: 1px solid rgba(232,116,138,.2);
    }
    .letter-header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 24px; }
    .letter-header .date-tag { font-size: .75rem; letter-spacing: .14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--rose); margin-bottom: 8px; }
    .letter-header h2 { font-family: 'Dancing Script',cursive; font-size: clamp(1.6rem,6vw,2.2rem); color: var(--deep); }
    .letter-text { font-size: .92rem; line-height: 1.8; color: var(--text); }
    .letter-text p { margin-bottom: 14px; }
    .letter-text em { font-family: 'Dancing Script',cursive; font-size: 1.05em; color: var(--rose); }
    .inline-photo { width: 100%; border-radius: 14px; overflow: hidden; margin: 18px 0; box-shadow: 0 6px 24px rgba(198,91,115,.2); }
    .inline-photo img { width: 100%; display: block; object-fit: cover; max-height: 280px; }
    .photo-caption { text-align: center; font-size: .78rem; color: var(--mauve); margin-top: -12px; margin-bottom: 14px; font-style: italic; }
    .letter-footer { text-align: center; margin-top: 24px; }
    .letter-footer .sig { font-family: 'Dancing Script',cursive; font-size: 1.5rem; color: var(--deep); }

    /* ══════ PAGE 3 – MÚSICA ══════ */
    #page3 {
      background: linear-gradient(160deg,#1a0a10 0%,#3d1325 45%,#7A2D42 100%);
      z-index: 1; justify-content: flex-start;
    }

    .music-wrap {
      position: relative; z-index: 2;
      max-width: 480px; width: 100%;
      padding-top: 10px;
    }

    .music-header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 22px; }
    .music-note-anim {
      font-size: 2.2rem; display: block; margin-bottom: 10px;
      animation: noteBounce 1.8s ease-in-out infinite;
    }
    @keyframes noteBounce {
      0%,100% { transform: translateY(0) rotate(-8deg); }
      50%     { transform: translateY(-10px) rotate(8deg); }
    }
    .music-header h2 {
      font-family: 'Dancing Script',cursive;
      font-size: clamp(1.6rem,6vw,2.2rem);
      color: #fff; margin-bottom: 4px;
    }
    .music-header .artist {
      font-size: .8rem; letter-spacing: .18em; text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--gold); opacity: .85;
    }

    /* vinyl record */
    .vinyl-wrap { display: flex; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 22px; }
    .vinyl {
      width: 110px; height: 110px; border-radius: 50%;
      background: radial-gradient(circle at 50%, #888 0 8%, #1a1a1a 8% 30%, #2a2a2a 30% 33%, #1a1a1a 33% 60%, #2a2a2a 60% 63%, #1a1a1a 63%);
      box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.6);
      position: relative; flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .vinyl.playing { animation: spin 4s linear infinite; }
    @keyframes spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }
    .vinyl::after {
      content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 38%;
      background: var(--rose); border-radius: 50%;
      box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px #1a1a1a, 0 0 0 5px var(--gold);
    }

    /* play / pause button */
    .play-btn {
      width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 50%;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--rose), var(--mauve));
      border: none; cursor: pointer; font-size: 1.3rem;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(198,91,115,.5);
      margin-left: 18px; align-self: center; flex-shrink: 0;
      transition: transform .2s;
    }
    .play-btn:hover { transform: scale(1.08); }

    /* spotify link */
    .spotify-link {
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
      background: rgba(255,255,255,.08); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15);
      border-radius: 10px; padding: 10px 16px; margin-bottom: 22px;
      text-decoration: none; transition: background .2s;
    }
    .spotify-link:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,.14); }
    .spotify-link .sp-icon { font-size: 1.4rem; }
    .spotify-link .sp-text { color: #fff; font-size: .85rem; line-height: 1.3; }
    .spotify-link .sp-text span { display: block; font-size: .72rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,.55); }

    /* lyrics card */
    .lyrics-card {
      background: rgba(255,255,255,.07);
      border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);
      border-radius: 18px; padding: 24px 22px;
      margin-bottom: 22px;
    }
    .lyrics-stanza { margin-bottom: 20px; }
    .lyrics-stanza:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }
    .lyrics-line {
      font-family: 'Lato',sans-serif; font-size: .88rem;
      line-height: 1.85; color: rgba(255,255,255,.7);
      display: block;
      transition: color .4s, transform .3s;
    }
    .lyrics-line.highlight {
      color: var(--gold);
      font-style: italic;
      transform: translateX(4px);
    }
    .chorus-label {
      font-size: .68rem; letter-spacing: .15em; text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--rose); margin-bottom: 8px; display: block;
    }
    .chorus-lines .lyrics-line {
      font-family: 'Dancing Script',cursive; font-size: 1.05rem;
      color: rgba(255,255,255,.85);
    }
    .chorus-lines .lyrics-line.highlight { color: var(--gold); }

    .note-for-him {
      background: rgba(232,116,138,.15); border-left: 3px solid var(--rose);
      border-radius: 0 12px 12px 0; padding: 14px 16px; margin-bottom: 22px;
    }
    .note-for-him p {
      font-size: .83rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,.8); line-height: 1.7; font-style: italic;
    }
    .note-for-him p em { color: var(--gold); font-style: normal; }

    /* ══════ PAGE 4 – GALERIA ══════ */
    #page4 {
      background: linear-gradient(160deg,#4A2030 0%,#7A2D42 40%,#C65B73 100%);
      z-index: 1;
    }
    .final-inner { position: relative; z-index: 2; text-align: center; max-width: 480px; width: 100%; }
    .final-title { font-family: 'Dancing Script',cursive; font-size: clamp(2.2rem,9vw,3.4rem); color: #fff; text-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.3); margin-bottom: 8px; }
    .final-sub   { font-size: .9rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,.7); letter-spacing: .1em; margin-bottom: 28px; }

    .polaroid-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2,1fr); gap: 14px; margin-bottom: 28px; }
    .polaroid {
      background: #fff; padding: 10px 10px 28px; border-radius: 4px;
      box-shadow: 0 8px 28px rgba(0,0,0,.35); transform: rotate(var(--rot));
      transition: transform .3s;
    }
    .polaroid:hover { transform: rotate(0) scale(1.04); z-index: 5; }
    .polaroid img { width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 1; object-fit: cover; display: block; border-radius: 2px; }
    .polaroid-label { font-family: 'Dancing Script',cursive; font-size: .85rem; color: var(--text); text-align: center; margin-top: 6px; }

    .final-message {
      background: rgba(255,255,255,.12); backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
      border-radius: 16px; padding: 20px 22px; margin-bottom: 28px;
      border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2);
    }
    .final-message p { font-family: 'Dancing Script',cursive; font-size: clamp(1.3rem,5vw,1.8rem); color: #fff; line-height: 1.5; }
    .hearts-row { font-size: 1.6rem; letter-spacing: .3em; margin-bottom: 24px; }

    /* ── NAV DOTS ── */
    .nav-dots { position: fixed; bottom: 22px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); display: flex; gap: 10px; z-index: 100; }
    .dot { width: 9px; height: 9px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(198,91,115,.35); cursor: pointer; transition: background .3s, transform .3s; }
    .dot.active { background: var(--rose); transform: scale(1.35); }

    /* ── BACK BTN ── */
    .back-btn {
      position: fixed; top: 16px; left: 16px;
      background: rgba(255,255,255,.7); border: none; border-radius: 50%;
      width: 38px; height: 38px; font-size: 1.1rem; cursor: pointer;
      display: none; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.1); z-index: 200;
    }
    .back-btn.visible { display: flex; }

    #confetti-canvas { position: fixed; inset: 0; pointer-events: none; z-index: 999; }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="hearts-bg" id="heartsBg"></div>
<canvas id="confetti-canvas"></canvas>
<button class="back-btn" id="backBtn" onclick="goBack()">←</button>

<!-- ══════════════ PAGE 1 – CAPA ══════════════ -->
<section class="page active" id="page1">
  <div class="cover-inner">
    <div class="envelope-wrap" id="envelopeWrap" onclick="openEnvelope()">
      <div class="envelope">
        <span class="envelope-heart">💌</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <p class="tap-hint">toque no envelope ✨</p>
    <h1 class="cover-title">Feliz Dia<br>dos Namorados</h1>
    <p class="cover-sub">12 de Junho · com todo o meu amor</p>
    <button class="btn" id="startBtn" style="display:none" onclick="goTo(2)">Abrir a carta &nbsp;💕</button>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ══════════════ PAGE 2 – CARTA ══════════════ -->
<section class="page hidden" id="page2">
  <div class="letter-card">
    <div class="letter-header">
      <div class="date-tag">12 de junho · Dia dos Namorados</div>
      <h2>Para o meu amor</h2>
    </div>

    <div class="inline-photo">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64,
